title: digiquant-atlas Delta Request
description: Token-minimizing weekday output: a small set of deterministic ops to apply to a baseline digest snapshot JSON. The compiler applies ops to the baseline snapshot and upserts a fully materialized snapshot for the target date.

baseline_date.description: Baseline date this delta applies to (typically Sunday).

changed_paths.description: High-level paths the agent believes have changed (for audit / quick review).

ops.description: Deterministic operations to apply to baseline snapshot.

value.description: Required for set/append; omitted for remove.

reason.description: Short human-readable rationale for the change.

notes.description: Optional: short delta summary for humans.
